resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def minimumOneBitOperations(self, n: int) -> int:
        res = 0
        while n:
            res += n & 1
            n >>= 1
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses bitwise operations to count the number of 1-bits in the binary representation of n, which directly corresponds to the minimum number of operations required to transform n into 0.
